abilities.name: Auto-Tapestry of the Emperor's Judgement
abilities.desc: While this unit is leading a unit and contains an Aestred Thurga model, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability

abilities.name: Recount the Deeds of the Saints
abilities.desc: While this unit is leading a unit and contains and Agathae Dolan model, each time that unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain 1 Miracle dice. When that Agathae Dolan model is destroyed, you gain D3 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this units have an invulnerable save of 4+

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This unit can be attached to the following units: 
- Battle Sisters Squad
- Celestian Sacresants
- Dominion Squad
- Retributor Squad
- Sisters Novitiate Squad

abilities.name: Extremis Trigger Word
abilities.desc: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can choose to invoke its extremis trigger word. If you do, then until the end of the phase, arco-flails equipped by models in this unit have an Attacks characteristic of 6 and the HAZARDOUS ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Holy Judgement
abilities.desc: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this unit's Ephrael Stern model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 2 from the result if it is a Chaos unit. If the test is failed, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Mysterious Savious
abilities.desc: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this units have an Invulnerable save of 4+

abilities.name: Anchorite Sarcophagus
abilities.desc: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 7" and a Save Characteristic of 3+.

abilities.name: Anguish of the Unredeemed
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Righteous Paragons
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this units have an Invulnerable save of 4+.

abilities.name: Endless Suffering
abilities.desc: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

rangedWeapons.name: Condemnor boltgun
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Psyker 2+, Devastating Wounds, Precision, Rapid Fire 1

abilities.name: Cherubs
abilities.desc: Twice per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Storm of Retribution
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If such an attack targets an enemy unit that has destroyed one or more ^^**Adepta Sororitas^^** units from your army during the battle, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this units have an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This unit can be attached to the following units:
■ Seraphim Squad
■ Zephyrim Squad

abilities.name: Healing Tears
abilities.desc: While this unit contains a Celestine model, in your Command phase, if this unit is below its Starting Strength, either one destroyed Geminae Superia model or up to D3 other Bodyguard models are returned to this unit.

abilities.name: Lifewards
abilities.desc: While this unit contains one or more Geminae Superia models, Celestine has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abilities.name: Miraculous Intervention
abilities.desc: The first time this unit’s Celestine model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set that Celestine model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Angelic Ascent
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this units have an Invulnerable save of 5+.

abilities.name: Sacred Banner
abilities.desc: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Embodied Prophecy
abilities.desc:
Each time this unit is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to apply to melee weapons equipped by models in this unit until the end of the phase:
- Sustained Hits 1
- Lethal Hits


If this unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, select both abilities above to apply to melee weapons equipped by models in this unit instead.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have an Invulnerable save of 5+.

abilities.name: Spiritual Fortitude
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a BATTLE SISTERS SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have an Invulnerable save of 4+.

abilities.name: Ministorum Sermon
abilities.desc: While this unit contains a **^^Ministorum Priest**^^, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Cherub
abilities.desc: Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a ^^**Ministorum Priest^^** model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a ^^**Battle Sisters Squad^^**, it can be attached to this unit instead. If a ^^**Ministorum Priest^^** model from your army is attached to this unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, that model gains the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Simulacrum Imperialis
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

abilities.name: Salvationist Medikit
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can return up to D3 destroyed models (excluding ^^**Character models^^**) to this unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have an Invulnerable save of 5+.

abilities.name: Rituale Nullificatus
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Virtue of Intolerance
abilities.desc: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army to be this unit’s quarry. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets its quarry, that attack has the ^^**[Precision]^^** ability and you can re‑roll the Hit roll. This ability can be used even if this unit is embarked within a ^^**Transport**^^.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a ^^**Character^^** unit from your army can be attached to a ^^**Dominion Squad^^** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.name: Denuncia Oratory
abilities.desc: Each time the bearer’s unit’s quarry is destroyed, you can select a new unit from your opponent’s army to be its quarry.

abilities.name: Simulacrum Imperialis
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.
